LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2006-1'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS (CCP 438(C)(1)(A) IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO CONSTITUTE A DEFENSE TO THE COMPLAINT. (CCP 438(C)(1)(A).) DEFENDANT DENIES THAT THE PARTIES ENTERED INTO ANY CONTRACT. (ANSWER, 3B(2).) FURTHER, DEFENDANT ALLEGES THAT PLAINTIFF LACKS STANDING TO SUE. (ID. AT 4.) PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings (Ccp 438(C)(1)(A)
Off Calendar Aug-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Charles Dupigny, Tel. 415.606.2735, defendant appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2006-1's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings (CCP 438(C)(1)(A) is denied. Defendant has pled sufficient facts to constitute a defense to the Complaint. (CCP 438(c)(1)(A).) Defendant denies that the parties entered into any contract. (Answer, 3b(2).) Further, Defendant alleges that Plaintiff lacks standing to sue. (Id. at 4.) Plaintiff's Counsel to prepare a form of order. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
